title: The Eternal Skald
description:
An AI-powered storyteller, oracle interpreter, and tactical enemy controller for Ironsworn and Ironsworn: Delve campaigns in Foundry VTT v14. The Eternal Skald is a wise, dramatic norse narrator who serves as the GM at your table — interpreting oracle rolls, voicing NPCs, generating lore, narrating combat, and even taking control of enemy combatants on their turn.

Powered by the Abacus AI ChatLLM platform (Gemini 3.0 Flash by default). Type /skald-help in chat for the full command list.
